PLANTED POSITIVE CONTROL — do not treat as clean. This file deliberately carries an
owner-specific identifier and a transcript-shaped line so the no-secrets detector in
lib/test/test_create_issue_context_eval.py is proven to FIRE on the shape it guards
(not merely to pass on a clean tree). It is excluded by name from the clean scan.
